coach_notes: To build a strong healthcare career, focus on developing patient care and vital signs skills first, as they are foundational for most clinical roles. You can gain these through entry-level positions like a medical assistant or by taking online courses and volunteering at clinics. Your existing skills in conflict resolution and critical thinking will be valuable assets as you learn, so stay motivated and take small steps toward certifications like CPR to boost your confidence.
